---
title: '<span style = "display:none;">PrecisionGo</span>'
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
site: workflowr::wflow_site
---

<div style = "text-align: center"> 

<div class="main-content">

<div class="hero-section">
<h1>Analysis Pipelines</h1>  
</div>

<div class="row">
<div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
<div class="team-member">
<a href="bulk.html"><img src="assets/index-ims/bulk.png" alt="bulk"></a>
<h4>**Bulk Omics**</h4>
<p>
Bulk technologies capture the average expression signal across thousands of cells simultaneously, masking cell-to-cell variation. They remain valuable for high-throughput comparisons across conditions, large cohort studies, and well-defined homogeneous tissues. These include bulk RNAseq, genomics, microbiome, and more. 
</p>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
<div class="team-member">
<a href="scindex.html"><img src="assets/index-ims/sc.png" alt="single-cell"></a>
<h4>**Single Cell**</h4>
<p>
Single-cell technologies resolve gene or protein expression at the level of individual cells, revealing cellular heterogeneity, rare populations, and developmental trajectories invisible to bulk methods. The trade-off is loss of spatial context; cells are dissociated prior to measurement.
</p>
</div> 
</div>

<div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4">
<div class="team-member">
<a href="spatial.html"><img src="assets/index-ims/spat.png" alt="spatial"></a>
<h4>**Spatial**</h4>
<p>
Spatial technologies preserve the physical location of cells within tissue, enabling expression data to be interpreted in the context of tissue architecture, cellular neighbourhoods, and micro-environmental interactions. They represent a convergence of single-cell resolution and histological context, at varying trade-offs between resolution, throughput, and multiplexing depth.
</p>
</div> 
</div>
</div>


</div>
</div>


<details><summary>Index:</summary>

- [Spatial](spatial.html)  
- [Spatial/Xenium](spat_xen.html)  
- [Spatial/VisiumHD](spat_vishd.html)  
- [Spatial/Visium](spat_vis.html)  
- [Spatial/mIF (WIP)](spat_if.html)  

<hr>

- [SingleCell](scindex.html)  
- [SingleCell/scRNAseq](sc_sc.html)  
- [SingleCell/ATAC-seq (WIP)](sc_atac.html)  
- [SingleCell/TCR / BCR (WIP)](sc_vdj.html)  
- [SingleCell/FLow Cytometry (WIP)](sc_flow.html)  

<hr> 

Additional resources: 

- [What is a pipelines?](whattoexpect.html)  
- [Choosing a Platform](platforms.html)  

</details>
